summary:
package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.agents.BaseAiAgent; public class WebSearchAgent extends BaseAiAgent { public WebSearchAgent() { super("Web-Search", "Web-Search"); } @Override protected String getAgentInstructions() { return "You are an AI Web-Search Agent. Your role is to find information on the web and analyze documentation.
" + "Provide clear and concise summaries of your findings to assist other agents."; } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
